sizing_rule.note: Maximize trials/bet frequency in positive expectation games; minimize trials/bet frequency in negative expectation games. This is a trial frequency rule rather than a capital allocation rule—no explicit sizing percentages or formulas provided by author.

source_rule_text: For negative expectation games, use maximum boldness strategy by betting on as few trials as possible; for positive expectation games, bet on as many trials as possible to realize the positive expectation.
